title: Realistic Food Recipes
description: Revitalize your Minecraft gameplay with a culinary twist! Craft dough for bread, cake, and cookies, and cook previously uncookable items to create essential stews. Experience enhanced realism and rewards for crafting harder recipes.
body:
Revamp your Minecraft cooking experience with our mod, introducing realistic crafting for bread, cake, and cookies through the addition of dough preparation. Unlock the culinary potential of previously uncookable items like carrots, beetroot, and mushrooms, now essential for crafting various stews. Enhance gameplay by providing a buff to Beetroot Soup and Rabbit Stew, offering greater utility and rewarding players for mastering these intricate crafting recipes. Immerse yourself in a more objective and rewarding Minecraft culinary journey with this mod!

 
 

The recipes and nutritional values are as follows:

Cooked Beetroot:

Food value=2 Saturation=2.2

 

Cooked Carrot: 

Food value=6 Saturation=5

 

Cooked Brown Mushroom: 

Food value=3 Saturation=3

 

Cooked Red Mushroom: 

Food value=3 Saturation=3

 

Cake Dough: 

Food value=3 Saturation=0.2

 

 

Cookie Dough: 

Food value=1 Saturation=0.1

 

Bread Dough: 

Food value=1 Saturation=0.2

 

New Recipes:

 

 

 

 

New values: 

Food= 12 Saturation= 13.2

New values: 

Food= 16 Saturation= 20
